mapper.select: select id as id, prescription_no as prescriptionNo, register_id as registerId, record_id as recordId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, prescription_type as prescriptionType, diagnosis as diagnosis, total_amount as totalAmount, status as status, remark as remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from prescription where id = #{id}

select id as id, prescription_no as prescriptionNo, register_id as registerId, record_id as recordId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, prescription_type as prescriptionType, diagnosis as diagnosis, total_amount as totalAmount, status as status, remark as remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from prescription order by id desc

select id, prescription_no as prescriptionNo, register_id as registerId, record_id as recordId, pet_id as petId, doctor_id as doctorId, prescription_type as prescriptionType, diagnosis, total_amount as totalAmount, status, remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, created_time as createdTime, updated_time as updatedTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from prescription where is_deleted = 0 and register_id = #{registerId} order by id desc
